# Key artifacts — m6_release_gate_v1

## Committed (source of truth for offline proof)

- benchmarks/benchmark_v2_token_summary.json
- benchmarks/*.json (per-row throughput artifacts)
- docs/azimuth_bench/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md
- docs/azimuth_bench/DESIGN_PARTNER_EVAL.md
- release/evaluator/README.md
- pyproject.toml (distribution name benchmark-v2; import azimuth_bench)
- AGENTS.md (repo-local governance)
- tests/test_*.py (56 tests after evidence-bundle guard test)

## Generated by this audit (not committed unless policy allows)

- benchmarks/report/ — static report tree after `azbench report build`
- benchmarks/report/data/leaderboard.json, compare.json, summary.json, site_manifest.json
- benchmarks/report/data/runs/*/ — per-artifact JSON bundles
- benchmarks/report/exports/share_leaderboard.svg, share_compare.svg
- /tmp/azimuth_export.md — Markdown export
- /tmp/azimuth_release_gate_dist/benchmark_v2-0.1.0.tar.gz
- /tmp/azimuth_release_gate_dist/benchmark_v2-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl

## Merge behavior (test-backed; no extra benchmark run in this gate)

- tests/test_merge.py — multi-bundle merge, collisions, protocol mismatch classification
- Single-run `benchmarks/report/data/merge.json` — absent after unmerged build (verified: no merge.json in data dir for single-tree build)
